output:
# LNR Proposal — The Westmore Hotel Dallas

**For:** Texas Health Resources — Visiting Clinician Program
**Effective:** July 1, 2026 – June 30, 2027
**Currency:** USD
**All times:** Central Time (CT)

## Account Snapshot
Texas Health Resources is one of the largest faith-based, nonprofit health systems in North Texas. The Westmore is 8 minutes from the Medical District and naturally fits long-stay visiting clinician housing.

## Proposed LNR Structure

| Volume Tier (Annual RNs) | LNR Rate (USD) | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| 0–199 | $185 | Last-room availability not guaranteed |
| 200–499 | $175 | LRA Sun–Thu |
| 500–999 | $169 | LRA Sun–Thu, breakfast included |
| 1,000+ | $159 | LRA Sun–Thu, breakfast + parking included |

**Long-Stay Override:** Any single stay of 7+ nights priced at flat **$155 USD** regardless of tier. Discounted weekly housekeeping cycle. 25 sq ft work desk and pull-out sofa in every room.

## Booking & Billing
- Direct bill via Texas Health A/P portal, NET 30
- Master Travel Authorization required for direct bill
- Cancellation: 24 hours by 6:00 PM CT, no charge
- No-show: one night charged

## Performance Review
Quarterly business review at The Westmore (in person or virtual), led by GM and Director of Sales. Standing topics: pace vs. budget, service feedback, billing exceptions, contract amendments.

## Value-Adds at Signing
- 6 complimentary suite upgrades per quarter (subject to availability)
- 1 complimentary meeting room day per quarter (≤ 30 pax)
- Welcome amenity for any clinician staying 7+ nights
- Dedicated GM line for service escalation

## Decision Timeline
Proposal valid through June 1, 2026. We can hold rate space for the program for 14 days from the date of this letter. Please respond with intent to proceed by **May 23, 2026 — 5:00 PM CT**.

With genuine appreciation for the consideration,

**The Westmore Hotel Dallas**
Director of Sales — +1 (214) 555-0124
